# Go language server (gopls) test

# Start acme-lsp server
env HOME=$WORK		# location of gopls go build cache
acme-lsp -headless -server '\.go$:gopls -rpc.trace' &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#0'
L -headless fmt
cmp hello.go after-format.txt

# Definition of "fmt.Println"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#295'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'fmt/print\.go:.*:func Println\(a \.\.\.any\) \(n int, err error\) {'

# References to "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#340'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello.go:.*:type HelloGreeter struct{}'
stdout 'hello.go:.*:func \(g HelloGreeter\) Hello\(\) {'
stdout 'hello.go:.*:.*g := HelloGreeter{}'

# Type definition of "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#340'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello.go:.*:type HelloGreeter struct{}'

# Signature of method "Hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#354'
L -headless sig
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Hover over call to method "Hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#354'
L -headless hov
stdout 'func \(g HelloGreeter\) Hello\(\)'
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Implementations of the interface "Greeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#101'
L -headless impls
stdout 'hello.go:.*:type HelloGreeter struct{}'

# Completion in middle of contruction of struct "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#340'
L -headless comp
stdout 'HelloGreeter	struct{...}'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter interface{\.\.\.}'
stdout 'HelloGreeter struct{}'
stdout '\(HelloGreeter\).Hello func()'
stdout 'main func\(\)'
stdout '/hello\.go:'

# Rename HelloGreeter to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.go:'#202'
L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp hello.go after-rename.txt


-- hello.go --
package main // import "example.com/test"

import "fmt"

// Greeter is a greeting interface.
type Greeter interface {
	// Hello prints a greeting
	Hello( )
	}

// HelloGreeter greets with hello
type HelloGreeter struct{}

// Hello prints a hello greeting
func (g HelloGreeter) Hello( ) {
	fmt.Println("Hello, 世界")
	}

func main() {
	g := HelloGreeter{}
	g.Hello( )
	}
-- after-format.txt --
package main // import "example.com/test"

import "fmt"

// Greeter is a greeting interface.
type Greeter interface {
	// Hello prints a greeting
	Hello()
}

// HelloGreeter greets with hello
type HelloGreeter struct{}

// Hello prints a hello greeting
func (g HelloGreeter) Hello() {
	fmt.Println("Hello, 世界")
}

func main() {
	g := HelloGreeter{}
	g.Hello()
}
-- after-rename.txt --
package main // import "example.com/test"

import "fmt"

// Greeter is a greeting interface.
type Greeter interface {
	// Hello prints a greeting
	Hello()
}

// WorldGreeter greets with hello
type WorldGreeter struct{}

// Hello prints a hello greeting
func (g WorldGreeter) Hello() {
	fmt.Println("Hello, 世界")
}

func main() {
	g := WorldGreeter{}
	g.Hello()
}
